name: Account Management
reasoning: Missing evidence for automated account disabling (AC-2(3)).
Gap in evidence for temporary account management.
reviewer_question: Does the system automatically disable inactive accounts after 30 days of inactivity?
suggestion: Include system-generated logs showing automatic account disabling or a screenshot of the configuration policy.

name: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
reasoning: SIEM report confirms weekly log review and analysis.
Reviewer signatures present on monthly summary reports.
Evidence of centralized audit trail management found.
reviewer_question: Are audit logs reviewed at least weekly by a designated individual?
suggestion: No further action needed for prep. Keep current weekly audit logs organized.

name: Configuration Settings
reasoning: SCAP scan results show 98% compliance with STIG benchmarks.
Configuration drift monitoring active for production clusters.
Documented deviations for mission-essential bypasses found.
reviewer_question: How are deviations from baseline configuration settings documented and approved?
suggestion: Maintain the current configuration drift reports and justification documents.
